Label: Adverse Outcome Pathway
Description: A sequence of causally linked biological events leading from a molecular initiating event to an adverse health or environmental outcome.

Label: Cell-term
Description: The cell-type context in which a key event occurs.

Label: Key Event
Description: A measurable biological change that is essential for progression along an adverse outcome pathway.

Label: Key Event Relationship
Description: A causal linkage describing how one key event leads to another.

Label: Organ-term
Description: The organ or organ-system context in which a key event occurs.

Label: Gene identifier
Description: An identifier of a gene, such as a name/symbol or a unique identifier of a gene in a database.

Label: Gene ID (NCBI)
Description: An NCBI unique identifier of a gene.

Label: Ensembl gene ID
Description: Unique identifier for a gene (or other feature) from the Ensembl database.

Label: UniProt ID
Description: An identifier of a polypeptide in the UniProt database.

Label: Gene ID (HGNC)
Description: Identifier for a gene approved by the HUGO Gene Nomenclature Committee.

Label: biological process
Description: A biological process represents a series of molecular events with a defined beginning and end, carried out by one or more organized assemblies of molecular functions.

Label: Stressor
Description: An agent, stimulus, activity, or event that causes stress on an organism, speeds up a reaction rate, or keeps a reaction rate the same.

Label: chemical entity
Description: A chemical entity is any molecular entity or chemical substance.

Label: ChemSpider identifier
Description: Database identifier used by ChemSpider.

Label: DrugBank identifier
Description: Database identifier used by DrugBank.

Label: ChEBI identifier
Description: Database identifier used by ChEBI.

Label: HMDB identifier
Description: Database identifier used by Human Metabolome Database.

Label: KEGG identifier
Description: Database identifier used by KEGG.

Label: ChEMBL identifier
Description: Identifier used by the ChEMBL database for compounds, assays, target, etc.

Label: CAS registry number
Description: Identifier used by the Chemical Abstracts Service database.

Label: LipidMaps identifier
Description: Identifier used by the LipidMaps database, http://www.lipidmaps.org/.

Label: Wikidata identifier
Description: Database identifier used by Wikidata.

Label: Aop Context
Description: Links a key event to the adverse outcome pathway context in which it participates.

Label: Cell-term
Description: The cell-type context in which a key event occurs.

Label: Life Stage Context
Description: The life-stage context in which a key event applies.

Label: Organ-term
Description: The organ or organ-system context in which a key event occurs.

Label: has adverse outcome
Description: Links an AOP to the final adverse effect at the individual or population level.

Label: has chemical entity
Description: Links an AOP or key event to a chemical that can trigger or influence it.

Label: has downstream key event
Description: Identifies the later event in a key event relationship.

Label: has evidence
Description: Links to scientific evidence supporting an AOP or key event relationship.

Label: has key event
Description: Links an AOP to one of its component key events.

Label: has key event relationship
Description: Links an AOP to a causal relationship between two of its key events.

Label: has molecular initiating event
Description: Links an AOP to the initial interaction between a stressor and a biological system.

Label: has upstream key event
Description: Identifies the earlier event in a key event relationship.

Description: An identifier of a gene, such as a name/symbol or a unique identifier of a gene in a database.

Label: quality
Description: A dependent entity that inheres in a bearer by virtue of how the bearer is related to other entities.

Label: biological sex
Description: An organismal quality inhering in a bearer by virtue of the bearer's ability to produce gametes.

Label: physical object quality
Description: A quality which inheres in a continuant

Label: creator
Description: An entity primarily responsible for making the resource.

Label: description
Description: An account of the resource.

Label: identifier
Description: An unambiguous reference to the resource within a given context.

Label: source
Description: A related resource from which the described resource is derived.

Label: title
Description: A name given to the resource.

Label: abstract
Description: A summary of the resource.

Label: accural Periodicity
Description: The frequency with which items are added to the collection.

Label: alternative
Description: An alternative name by which the resource is known.

Label: created
Description: Date of creation of the resource.

Label: is Part Of
Description: A related resource in which the described resource is physically or logically included.

Label: modified
Description: Date on which the resource was last modified.

Label: label
Description: A human-readable name for the subject.

Label: see Also
Description: Indicates a resource that might provide additional information about the subject.

Label: same As
Description: Indicates that two resources denote the same individual.

Label: exact Match
Description: Indicates two concepts can be used interchangeably across ontologies.

Label: download URL
Description: A URL from which a distribution of the dataset can be downloaded.

Label: homepage
Description: A homepage for the subject.

Label: page
Description: A page or document about the subject.
